mapper.select:
SELECT id, item_code AS itemCode, item_name AS itemName, spec, unit, unit_price AS unitPrice, incentive_rate AS incentiveRate, use_yn AS useYn, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_by AS updatedBy, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM mes_item
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
ORDER BY id DESC
